title: Debt Gate Vestibule
body: Witness sigils flare as the first legal locks test your charter authority.

title: Engine Approach
body: Collapsed lockwork forces you through channels cut by old flood surges.

title: Synod Bailiffs
body: Oath-armed enforcers push emergency law through steel and fire.

title: Black Rain Sluice
body: A pressurized spill of ash water strips skin and seal-ink alike.

title: Three-Witness Locks
body: Every gate wheel demands true name, witness, and medium in exact order.

title: Healer's Niche
body: Canal medics left warmth, bandages, and one honest prayer.

title: Ledger Reliquary
body: A sealed chest hums with confiscated permits and unredacted receipts.

title: Iron Guard Captain
body: The provost's last gate captain blocks access to the engine spine.

title: Mirror Court Cutters
body: Contract blades strike from reflected angles to keep monopoly terms intact.

title: Memory Toll Chamber
body: The corridor drinks names and leaves navigation marks half-erased.

title: Regent Seat Cipher
body: The final lock rewrites itself unless each witness clause balances.

title: Floodline Alcove
body: Cool runoff and quiet stone steady shaking hands before the core.

title: Unredacted Charter Cache
body: A mirrored casket preserves amendments no council admitted existed.

title: Provost Cael Ardin
body: He offers order without accountability while the engine waits for your name.

title: Open Flood Stair
body: The way out cracks open as the basin chooses what law survives.
